response.overview: Seven young people, each with different personalities and backgrounds, decide to start a new life in Ufa. Using their last savings, they pay for a month of rent, but due to the schemes of a fraudulent realtor, they all end up in the same apartment. As they try to build their lives in the city, they find themselves in various situations, fall in love, and struggle to make a living.
response.title: Домочадцы
